c74object.name: ambitap.bed2hoa~
c74object.digest: Encode a channel-based surround bed to higher-order ambisonics (AmbiX: ACN/SN3D) by encoding each speaker feed at its canonical direction
c74object.description: Encode a channel-based surround bed to higher-order ambisonics (AmbiX: ACN/SN3D) by encoding each speaker feed at its canonical direction. Creation args: .

attribute.name: gain
attribute.digest: Linear output gain applied to the encoded bus
attribute.description: Linear output gain applied to the encoded bus.
